overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a futuristic urban environment (Cyberpunk 2077) showing a walk beneath massive elevated highway structures. The scene features concrete brutalist architecture, scattered urban vegetation, light vehicular traffic, and pedestrians, with a distinctive 'VOTE' billboard visible in the distance. The camera moves smoothly through the city streets, crossing intersections and passing under overpasses.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highway overpass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk under the highway overpass, approaching the intersection ahead

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure overhead with multiple levels
large cylindrical concrete pillars supporting the highway deck
overgrown grass and weeds along the sidewalk edge
large vertical billboard with 'VOTE' text and portrait, mounted on building
tall metal electrical pylons with multiple power lines
line of vehicles parked along the street curb

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking beneath a massive elevated highway structure. Concrete support pillars line the right side while vegetation grows along the sidewalk edge. In the distance, a large 'VOTE' billboard is visible against the city skyline, with power transmission towers rising in the background. The area is quiet with no pedestrians and only parked cars visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street approaching intersection with mixed commercial buildings

events.description: yellow commercial building becomes visible on the left as the camera advances

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the sidewalk, passing parked vehicles and approaching the crosswalk area

notable_agents.action: person in red clothing walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: distinctive yellow-painted commercial building with multiple windows
modern high-rise building under construction with glass facade

segments.scene_description: As the camera advances, a distinctive yellow building emerges on the left, revealing more of the urban commercial district. The 'VOTE' billboard shifts to the left side of the frame as the perspective changes. Sparse pedestrian traffic appears, with individuals walking in the opposite direction. The environment remains under the highway overpass with consistent concrete architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection crosswalk beneath highway overpass

events.description: approaching and entering the crosswalk at the intersection
traffic light shows red, vehicles stopped at the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the multi-lane intersection at the crosswalk, navigating through pedestrian traffic

notable_agents.action: green sports car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: vertical traffic signal showing red light
white striped pedestrian crossing lines on asphalt
metal scaffolding structure on building under construction

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from under the overpass into a wide urban intersection, crossing the street at the marked crosswalk. Pedestrians are crossing in various directions while vehicles navigate the intersection. A traffic light on the right shows red for vehicles. The 'VOTE' billboard recedes into the left background as the camera moves forward, and construction scaffolding becomes visible on distant buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway underpass with construction mound and electrical infrastructure

events.description: large military-style truck drives past the camera from behind on the left

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk under the overpass, passing a large dirt mound and approaching the next intersection

notable_agents.action: large black military truck with multiple axles driving past

entered.detail: large pile of dirt and construction material under the overpass
traffic signal at the upcoming intersection showing red
curved highway ramp structure connecting to main deck

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues under the highway overpass, passing a large dirt mound used for construction or landscaping. A large military truck drives past on the left side of the frame. The camera approaches another intersection with traffic lights visible ahead. The concrete support pillars now dominate the center of the view as the walkway curves slightly, with power lines and transmission towers prominent on the right side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a quiet, brutalist underpass into a bustling urban intersection before returning to the shadow of massive highway structures. It begins beneath a towering elevated highway, moving past concrete pillars and roadside vegetation toward a distant VOTE billboard and power transmission towers. As the camera advances, a yellow commercial building emerges on the left and sparse pedestrians appear, shifting the perspective of the billboard as the path continues under the overpass. The scene then opens into a wide city intersection, crossing a marked crosswalk amidst flowing vehicle traffic and pedestrians while construction scaffolding becomes visible in the distance. Finally, the camera moves back under the concrete canopy, passing a large dirt mound and a military truck before curving toward another set of traffic lights flanked by prominent power lines.
